answer:
The net force on the test charge is zero, so the electric force must cancel the magnetic force:  
\( q\mathbf{E} + q(\mathbf{v} \times \mathbf{B}) = 0 \), thus \( \mathbf{E} = -\mathbf{v} \times \mathbf{B} \).  
Given \( \mathbf{v} = \mathbf{i}_x + \mathbf{i}_y \) and \( \mathbf{B} = \mathbf{i}_x - 2\mathbf{i}_z \), compute \( \mathbf{v} \times \mathbf{B} = (1)(-2)(\mathbf{i}_y \times \mathbf{i}_z) + (1)(1)(\mathbf{i}_x \times \mathbf{i}_x) + (1)(-2)(\mathbf{i}_x \times \mathbf{i}_z) + (1)(1)(\mathbf{i}_y \times \mathbf{i}_x) = -2\mathbf{i}_x
